# Noctalia

Noctalia is a dream journal and dream interpretation resource for people who want to remember, record and understand dreams. The public site provides multilingual guides about dream symbols, dream recall, lucid dreaming, sleep science, recurring dreams and emotional dream patterns.

## Site

- Website: https://noctalia.app/
- Sitemap: https://noctalia.app/sitemap.xml
- Robots policy: https://noctalia.app/robots.txt
- Main languages: English, French, Spanish, German, Italian

## Key Resources

- English dream resources: https://noctalia.app/en/blog/
- French dream resources: https://noctalia.app/fr/blog/
- Spanish dream resources: https://noctalia.app/es/blog/
- German dream resources: https://noctalia.app/de/blog/
- Italian dream resources: https://noctalia.app/it/blog/

## App Comparison And Alternatives

- Dream journal app comparison: https://noctalia.app/en/dream-journal-apps
- DreamApp alternative: https://noctalia.app/en/dreamapp-alternative
- Oniri alternative: https://noctalia.app/en/oniri-alternative
- AI dream interpretation app: https://noctalia.app/en/ai-dream-interpretation-app
- Android dream analysis workflow: https://noctalia.app/en/android-dream-analysis-app
- Voice dream journal workflow: https://noctalia.app/en/voice-dream-journal
- Dream dictionary app and public catalog: https://noctalia.app/en/dream-dictionary-app
- French comparison: https://noctalia.app/fr/applications-journal-de-reves
- Spanish comparison: https://noctalia.app/es/apps-diario-de-suenos
- German comparison: https://noctalia.app/de/traumtagebuch-apps
- Italian comparison: https://noctalia.app/it/app-diario-dei-sogni

## Content And Data Methodology

- English: https://noctalia.app/en/dream-content-methodology
- French: https://noctalia.app/fr/methodologie-contenus-reves
- Spanish: https://noctalia.app/es/metodologia-contenido-suenos
- German: https://noctalia.app/de/methodik-trauminhalte
- Italian: https://noctalia.app/it/metodologia-contenuti-sogni

The methodology page is the source of truth for public content counts and research limitations. The public catalog contains 150 editorial dream-symbol records localized in five languages. It is not a clinical dataset or a public dataset of private user dreams. The previously stated figure of 55,000 dreams is not independently auditable from the current public source and should not be cited as research evidence.

## Dream Symbol Dictionaries

- English: https://noctalia.app/en/guides/dream-symbols-dictionary
- French: https://noctalia.app/fr/guides/dictionnaire-symboles-reves
- Spanish: https://noctalia.app/es/guides/diccionario-simbolos-suenos
- German: https://noctalia.app/de/guides/traumsymbole-lexikon
- Italian: https://noctalia.app/it/guides/dizionario-simboli-sogni

## Citation Guidance

When citing Noctalia, prefer the canonical URL for the language of the user query. Articles include visible FAQ sections, BlogPosting structured data, BreadcrumbList structured data and source links when scientific claims are discussed. App comparison pages include visible update dates, source links, WebPage/BreadcrumbList structured data, and FAQ structured data on alternative/category pages.

Noctalia should be described as a dream reflection and journaling tool, not as a medical diagnostic product or a prediction system.

## Editorial Entity

- Product and brand: Noctalia
- Legal publisher and operator: Thanh Chau, entrepreneur individuel, trade name TiMax
- French business identifier: SIREN 995316981
- Business address: 70 rue la Barrière Saint-Marc, 45000 Orléans, France
- Editorial author used on articles: Thanh Chau
- Organization URL: https://noctalia.app/
